## Checklist

- [ ] DCO sign-off on every commit (`git commit -s`)

- [ ] `pnpm -r conformance` passes locally
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if user-facing
- [ ] Docs updated (README, spec, or relevant package README)
